source_name: NHSAC Quarterly Report - National Housing Accord progress
notes: Manual entry from the NHSAC Quarterly Report - March 2026. The report states that 219,000 new homes were completed over the first five quarters since the Accord started and gives Australia's share of the Accord target built to date as 18%. Latest building completions data are as at the September 2025 quarter.
citation: National Housing Supply and Affordability Council, Quarterly Report - March 2026.

fields.source_notes: NHSAC notes the completion total aggregates gross dwelling units completed since the June 2024 quarter to the September 2025 quarter in seasonally adjusted terms.
